rules.intro: Every prediction is compared to the final score. Here is the scoring system, step by step.

winner.title: Correct winner
winner.description: Pick the right outcome (win or draw): you score {{factor}} points multiplied by the odds of your prediction. Wrong winner: 0 points for the whole match, no bonus can save it.
winner.fallback: If no odds are available, odds of {{odds}} apply.

exactScore.title: Exact score
exactScore.description: The jackpot: your predicted score is exactly the final score.

gap.title: Right margin
gap.description: Exact points margin: +{{exact}} pts. Margin within {{tolerance}} points: +{{close}} pts. Only one of the two counts, and the exact score replaces both.

defensive.title: Defensive bonus
defensive.description: You predicted a tight game and it was one: predicted AND actual margin of {{gap}} points or less, draws excluded.

offensive.title: Offensive bonus
offensive.description: Tick a team you expect to score {{tries}} tries or more. Success: {{percent}}% of {{factor}} × its win odds. Ticked but missed: −{{malus}} pts.
offensive.note: The bonus only counts if you picked the right winner.

bareme.floor: Whatever happens, a match total never drops below 0.

deadline.title: Kick-off deadline
deadline.description: Your prediction can be edited until kick-off, then it locks. The deadline is enforced server-side, not just in the app.

masked.title: Hidden predictions
masked.description: Other members' predictions stay hidden until kick-off. Nobody can copy yours.

leagues.title: Leagues and standings
leagues.description: Create a league or join one with an invite code. Every match earns points, and the standings add up all your matches in the competition.
